MemberSignature.Value: public virtual Azure.ResourceManager.ArmOperation<Azure.ResourceManager.Resources.Policy.PolicyExemptionResource> CreateOrUpdate (Azure.WaitUntil waitUntil, string policyExemptionName, Azure.ResourceManager.Resources.Policy.PolicyExemptionData data, System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

.method public hidebysig newslot virtual instance class Azure.ResourceManager.ArmOperation`1<class Azure.ResourceManager.Resources.Policy.PolicyExemptionResource> CreateOrUpdate(valuetype Azure.WaitUntil waitUntil, string policyExemptionName, class Azure.ResourceManager.Resources.Policy.PolicyExemptionData data, valuetype System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken) cil managed

Public Overridable Function CreateOrUpdate (waitUntil As WaitUntil, policyExemptionName As String, data As PolicyExemptionData, Optional cancellationToken As CancellationToken = Nothing) As ArmOperation(Of PolicyExemptionResource)

abstract member CreateOrUpdate : Azure.WaitUntil * string * Azure.ResourceManager.Resources.Policy.PolicyExemptionData * System.Threading.CancellationToken -> Azure.ResourceManager.ArmOperation<Azure.ResourceManager.Resources.Policy.PolicyExemptionResource> override this.CreateOrUpdate : Azure.WaitUntil * string * Azure.ResourceManager.Resources.Policy.PolicyExemptionData * System.Threading.CancellationToken -> Azure.ResourceManager.ArmOperation<Azure.ResourceManager.Resources.Policy.PolicyExemptionResource>

Docs.param: if the method should wait to return until the long-running operation has completed on the service; if it should return after starting the operation. For more information on long-running operations, please see Azure.Core Long-Running Operation samples.
The name of the policy exemption to get.
Parameters for the policy exemption.
The cancellation token to use.
Docs.summary:
This operation creates or updates a policy exemption with the given scope and name. Policy exemptions apply to all resources contained within their scope. For example, when you create a policy exemption at resource group scope for a policy assignment at the same or above level, the exemption exempts to all applicable resources in the resource group.
Request Path. /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/policyExemptions/{policyExemptionName}.
Operation Id. PolicyExemptions_CreateOrUpdate.
Default Api Version. 2025-12-01-preview.
Docs.exception: is an empty string, and was expected to be non-empty.

Docs.summary:
This operation creates or updates a policy exemption with the given scope and name. Policy exemptions apply to all resources contained within their scope. For example, when you create a policy exemption at resource group scope for a policy assignment at the same or above level, the exemption exempts to all applicable resources in the resource group.
